title: CustomDataSource
description: JSON template for an Analytics custom data source.

accountId.description: Account ID to which this custom data source belongs.

href.description: Link to the list of daily uploads for this custom data source. Link to the list of uploads for this custom data source.

created.description: Time this custom data source was created.

kind.description: Resource type for Analytics custom data source.

name.description: Name of this custom data source.

parentLink.description: Parent link for this custom data source. Points to the web property to which this custom data source belongs.

href.description: Link to the web property to which this custom data source belongs.

profilesLinked.description: IDs of views (profiles) linked to the custom data source.

schema.description: Collection of schema headers of the custom data source.

selfLink.description: Link for this Analytics custom data source.

type.description: Type of the custom data source.

updated.description: Time this custom data source was last modified.

uploadType.description: Upload type of the custom data source.

webPropertyId.description: Web property ID of the form UA-XXXXX-YY to which this custom data source belongs.
